summary: The diff implements both REQ-6 and REQ-7 comprehensively. The app is renamed to 'AD TRIBE' in index.html title, AppLayout header, and LandingPage hero. The landing page is redesigned with a hero background image, warm amber/charcoal/gold palette, tribe-themed feature cards, CTA button, stats strip, and responsive layout. No missing requirements or hallucinated features were identified.
